title: Office & Industrial/Flex
subtitle: The post-COVID office reset and the industrial supercycle
description: Office is the most challenged asset class post-COVID, while industrial is in a multi-decade supercycle. This course teaches how to evaluate both — from trophy Class A office to suburban medical office to bulk distribution and small-bay industrial flex, plus last-mile logistics and IOS (industrial outdoor storage).
outcomes: Assess office market fundamentals post-COVID and find safe pockets
Underwrite Class A, B, and C office differently
Understand bulk distribution, light industrial, and flex/R&D space
Evaluate last-mile logistics sites and IOS (industrial outdoor storage)
Know which Florida submarkets are industrial growth zones
